printed.name: Sitting side prop Push Through Group
printed.setup: Sitting upright, facing sideways, arms straight, one hand holding PTBar, palm facing down, other hand reaching out to side, fingertips touching Mat

movement.exhale: Abduct shoulder, abduct scapula → Down, Put / Inhale: Adduct scapula → In / Exhale: Abduct shoulder, abduct scapula return to start position
